name: Stugan

source.drawing: Hand-drawn plan + north/south wall section, single-room cottage

assumptions: 330×220 read as exterior envelope; wall thickness 10 cm assumed (not on sketch).
Window vertical placement from the section: sill 110, glass 45 high (head 155), 60 cm wall above; wall height 215 for both north and south walls, flat ceiling assumed.
Both 115 windows placed 100 cm from the west corner per both chains (100+115+115=330).
Door on the west wall, 70 cm from each corner (70+80+70=220); door height 195 assumed (not on sketch). No swing drawn.
Sketch chains sum exactly on all sides, so measurements taken at face value.
Site: exact coordinates from owner (58.327128N, 11.793014E, Uddevalla). Plan-up faces south-west (bearing 225) per owner => northOffset 135 (true north is 135 deg clockwise from plan-up).
